finding: scattering chaos: bounded orbits are regular, chaotic orbits ESCAPE (|X|->1e11-1e16)
implication: the 0-1 test needs a BOUNDED stationary observable; the raw escaping X-coordinate of di-hole scattering chaos is not one, so the detector reads EMIT-regular for the observable it is given. A representation boundary, not a bounded-chaos miss (tabula validated the test on Lorenz, a bounded attractor).
